channel.title: 2026-03-05 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-05 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Ferroelectricity in atomic-scale titanium dioxide dielectric films
item.description:
📚 AAAS: Science: Table of Contents
👤 Koushik Das, Kate Reidy, Sajid Husain, Jong Ho Park, Harishankar Jayakumar, Vivek Thampy, Christoph Klewe, Ramamoorthy Ramesh, Andrew M. Minor, Archana Raja, Sayeef Salahuddin
Science, Volume 392, Issue 6795, Page 280-284, April 2026.

item.title: Gravitational Collapse Primes Galactic Magnetism
item.description:
📚 Physics
👤 Charles Day
Author(s): Charles Day A coordinate transformation devised for an expanding universe leads to new insights into how a collapsing protogalaxy acquires a large magnetic field. [Physics 19, s26] Published Thu Mar 05, 2026
